Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Dec-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Katherine O'Neal, Esq., for Don A. Lesser, Esq., Defendant/Moving Party

Tentative Ruling adopted: Defendant's Motion To For Order Establishing Admissions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant's Request For Admissions is deemed admitted. Monetary sanctions are awarded in the total amount of $1,145 for the three motions heard on this date. The sanctions shall be paid within 30 days of notice of these orders. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Tentative Ruling adopted: Defendant Don A. Lesser's Motion To Compel Answers To Special Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions are granted. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
